cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the problem is about counting how many mauve things are left on the nightstand after removing all the cat toys. So I need to remove the cat toys first. The cat toys are the two mauve ones and the two green ones. So after removing them, those four items (two mauve and two green) are gone. Now, what's left on the nightstand? The two green sheets of paper and the three mauve sheets of paper. Because we took away all the cat toys.
